title: Discover the INGEST command contract
description: Expose versioned non-interactive operations, supported variants, limits, schemas, outcomes, errors, and exit categories before reading a statement or mutating LEDGER. Implements G7 and UC-INGEST-006.
rationale: An AI Agent Host must be able to invoke ingestion safely without scraping prose or guessing compatibility.
story_want: discover the complete ingestion contract through an AI Agent Host or direct CLI use
story_so_that: every statement workflow uses compatible structured operations and predictable recovery
acceptance_criteria: Given a compatible Tally executable, when the client requests INGEST help or schema discovery, then it returns the versioned operations preview, inspect, approve, commit, resume, status, abandon, and cleanup with their input/result schemas, supported Format Variants, safe limits, stable errors, and exit categories without reading a source or mutating LEDGER.

Given any INGEST operation, when a valid request completes, then exactly one structured business result is written to stdout, metadata-only diagnostics use stderr, and the documented exit category matches the result.

Given an unknown operation, malformed input, or forbidden unknown field, when invocation is attempted, then INGEST returns a stable usage or validation error before source processing or LEDGER mutation.
Given incompatible INGEST, adapter, or LEDGER contract versions, when compatibility is checked, then INGEST returns a stable compatibility failure before source processing or mutation.
security_criteria: Help, schemas, diagnostics, and errors must not contain statement payloads, full account identifiers, credentials, or source paths.
